member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureManagedRedisExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure Managed Redis resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureManagedRedisExtensions.AddAzureManagedRedis(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Managed Redis resource to the application model.
member.param: The builder for the distributed application.
The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureManagedRedisExtensions.RunAsContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure Managed Redis resource to run locally in a container.
member.param: The Azure Managed Redis resource builder.
Callback that exposes underlying container to allow for customization.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureManagedRedisExtensions.WithAccessKeyAuthentication(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to use access key authentication for Azure Managed Redis.
member.param: The Azure Managed Redis resource builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureManagedRedisExtensions.WithAccessKeyAuthentication(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.IAzureKeyVaultResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to use access key authentication for Azure Managed Redis.
member.param: The Azure Managed Redis resource builder.
The Azure Key Vault resource builder where the connection string used to connect to this AzureManagedRedisResource will be stored.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Managed Redis resource.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Represents an Azure Managed Redis resource.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.ConnectionStringOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "connectionString" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Managed Redis resource.
This is used when Entra ID authentication is used. The connection string is an output of the bicep template.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.ConnectionStringSecretOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "connectionString" secret reference from the key vault associated with this resource.
This is set when access key authentication is used. The connection string is stored in a secret in the Azure Key Vault.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.PrimaryAccessKeySecretOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "primaryAccessKey" secret reference from the key vault associated with this resource.
This is set when access key authentication is used. The primary access key is stored in a secret in the Azure Key Vault.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.HostNameOutput
member.summary: Gets the "hostName" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Redis resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.UseAccessKeyAuthentication
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the resource uses access key authentication.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.InnerResource
member.summary:
Gets the inner Redis resource.
This is set when RunAsContainer is called on the AzureManagedRedisResource resource to create a local Redis container.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Managed Redis resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.HostName
member.summary: Gets the host name for the Redis server.
member.remarks: In container mode, resolves to the container's primary endpoint host and port. In Azure mode, resolves to the Azure Redis server's hostname.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.Port
member.summary: Gets the port for the Redis server.
member.remarks: In container mode, resolves to the container's primary endpoint port. In Azure mode, resolves to 10000.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.Password
member.summary: Gets the password/access key for the Redis server.

list.item: When running as a container, returns the password parameter value if one exists.
When using access key authentication in Azure mode, returns the primary access key from KeyVault.
When using Entra ID authentication in Azure mode, returns an empty expression.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureManagedRedisResource.UriExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection URI expression for the Redis server.
member.remarks: Format: redis://[:{password}@]{host}:{port}. The password segment is omitted when using Entra ID authentication in Azure mode.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Cache for Redis resource.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Represents an Azure Cache for Redis resource.
member.param: The name of the resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.ConnectionStringOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "connectionString" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Redis resource.
This is used when Entra ID authentication is used. The connection string is an output of the bicep template.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.ConnectionStringSecretOutput
member.summary:
Gets the "connectionString" secret reference from the key vault associated with this resource.
This is set when access key authentication is used. The connection string is stored in a secret in the Azure Key Vault.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.HostNameOutput
member.summary: Gets the "hostName" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Redis resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.UseAccessKeyAuthentication
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the resource uses access key authentication.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.InnerResource
member.summary:
Gets the inner Redis resource.
This is set when RunAsContainer is called on the AzureRedisCacheResource resource to create a local Redis container.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Cache for Redis resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.HostName
member.summary: Gets the host name for the Redis server.
member.remarks: In container mode, resolves to the container's primary endpoint host and port. In Azure mode, resolves to the Azure Redis server's hostname.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource.Password
member.summary: Gets the password for the Redis server when running as a container.
member.remarks: This property returns null when running in Azure mode, as Redis access is handled via connection strings. When running as a container, it resolves to the password parameter value if one exists.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisResource
member.summary: Represents an Azure Redis resource.
member.param: The inner resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisResource.#ctor(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: Represents an Azure Redis resource.
member.param: The inner resource.
Callback to configure the Azure resources.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisResource.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets the "connectionString" output reference from the bicep template for the Azure Redis resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisResource.ConnectionStringExpression
member.summary: Gets the connection string template for the manifest for the Azure Redis resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure Redis resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions.PublishAsAzureRedis(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to be published as Azure Cache for Redis when deployed via Azure Developer CLI.
member.param: The builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions.AsAzureRedis(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource})
member.summary: Configures resource to use Azure for local development and when doing a deployment via the Azure Developer CLI.
member.param: The builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions.AddAzureRedis(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Cache for Redis resource to the application model.
member.param: The builder for the distributed application.
The name of the resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions.RunAsContainer(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource},System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.RedisResource}})
member.summary: Configures an Azure Cache for Redis resource to run locally in a container.
member.param: The Azure Cache for Redis resource builder.
Callback that exposes underlying container to allow for customization.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions.WithAccessKeyAuthentication(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to use access key authentication for Azure Cache for Redis.
member.param: The Azure Cache for Redis resource builder.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureRedisExtensions.WithAccessKeyAuthentication(Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureRedisCacheResource},Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.IAzureKeyVaultResource})
member.summary: Configures the resource to use access key authentication for Azure Cache for Redis.
member.param: The Azure Cache for Redis resource builder.
The Azure Key Vault resource builder where the connection string used to connect to this AzureRedisCacheResource will be stored.
